name: Status Monitor
author: Bluscream (bluscream_)
short: Logs all service status changes from lookup.minopia.de to channels
description: Polls the https://lookup.minopia.de/api/status/all endpoint and posts a message to configured channels whenever any monitored service's status changes. No filtering - all changes for all services are logged.
install_msg: Thanks for installing Status Monitor! Use `[p]statusmonitor addchannel` to start logging service status changes.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores channel IDs used for posting service status change updates.
